title: crepinia biserrata
intro: Crepinia biserrata, also known as the 'biserrate twiner', is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to tropical Africa, where it is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating pain, making it a valuable herb in local remedies. Crepinia biserrata is often prepared in herbal tea or infused oil form for medicinal use, and its extracts are also used in modern pharmaceutical applications.
